permits.description: This homeowner signed a contract with Sunrun to install a PV system on their house. Sunrun, a national company, used Vision Solar as the subcontractor to build the system, but Vision Solar never pulled the permits and have since gone out of business. My company, Apex Energy Tek were hired by Sunrun to complete this job. As of now, panels are on the roof with no production. Apex plans to take over this project and close out with required inspections (20 Panels, 6.6kW)
permits.score_reasons: keyword: complete; minor: sign; permit completed; all permits completed
